title: Power to seize and sell property
doc_html:
§5814.  Power to seize and sell property

Constables may seize and sell movable and immovable property, under writs of justices of the peace, the same as the sheriffs may do.

Redesignated from R.S. 33:1706 pursuant to Acts 2011, No. 248, §3.
